title: Field History Tracking Not Capturing Updates
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want field edits in the Data Dictionary to be reliably captured in the change history, so that I can track who changed what and when.
description:
Field history tracking appeared to stop capturing changes when a user updated a field in the Data Dictionary. Investigation and re-testing were needed to confirm the issue and apply a fix.

A minor code adjustment was made, though the developer noted it may have been working before the change as well. The fix was verified by re-testing the history capture flow.
acceptance_criteria: Editing a field in the Data Dictionary creates a history record
History record captures the previous value, new value, user, and timestamp
History records are visible in the field history view
middleware_changes: Minor code adjustment to ensure field update events are properly captured in the history tracking system.
implementation_notes: The root cause was uncertain — a small code adjustment was applied and the issue was verified resolved through manual testing. The developer noted it may have been a timing or race condition rather than a logic bug.
comment_summary: Developer tested and confirmed history tracking was working after a minor code adjustment. Provided a screenshot showing successful history capture.
